dark wood side table with shelf

member_long_descriptions: Front-facing, edge-cropped dark brown leather couch with three vertically segmented padded backrests and wide stitched seat channels, visible sheen and creasing on the leather, right armrest with built-in cupholder/control visible; partial/cropped edges; approximately 1.0 m from camera.

Low dark-brown wooden side table with a rectangular top, thick square legs and a lower shelf holding a woven basket; top surface bears a potted trailing plant, a white coaster and small items; object is close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m) and is slightly edge-cropped at the top-right of the crop.

Edge-cropped close-up of a dark glossy curved side table with a recessed rectangular tray containing small metallic objects; surface appears dark brown to black with a smooth reflective finish and compact low profile, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

White scalloped fabric lampshade with decorative trim sitting on a pale ornate base; shade appears illuminated and the lower base is partially cropped and occluded by green plant leaves — approximately 0.6 m from camera.

Dark brown (near-black) leather three-seat reclining-style couch with segmented padded back and seat cushions, visible topstitching and a slight glossy finish; padded armrests with shallow cupholder recesses; left side of the couch is partially cropped in the image; appears approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.

Dark brown wooden side table with a glossy finish, rectangular top and lower shelf supported by turned legs and a carved apron; front/right portion of the table is visible and the crop is partial/cut off at the edge — estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.

Close-up partial view of a dark brown leather couch arm and adjacent seat cushion with visible stitched seams, padded rectangular arm shape, surface creasing and glossy highlights indicating worn but intact upholstery; crop is edge-cut and photographed at close range (≈0.6 m from camera).

Partial close-up of a dark brown/black leather couch showing the right-side padded armrest and adjacent seat cushion with a smooth, slightly glossy surface and visible seam stitching; the couch is edge-cropped in the image and appears close to the camera (about 0.8 m).

Partial close-up of a dark (black-to-deep-brown) leather couch arm and adjacent seat cushion, edge-cropped on the right, showing stitched seams, padded upholstery with slight creasing and a glossy leather texture; appears close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

Partial white-painted wooden mantel-style shelf visible above a black fireplace surround with decorative recessed panels and curved vertical moulding; right/top of the shelf is edge-cropped and sits next to a grey curtain, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark painted wooden fireplace surround with stepped, curved decorative molding and a deep black firebox opening; the right side of the surround is visible and the crop is partial/edge-cut, photographed from close range (approx. 0.6 m).

Partial crop showing a dark charcoal-painted wooden fireplace mantel with stepped molding visible along the top and left edges; the firebox interior is a deep black void and a mottled gray-brown stone or hearth log is visible at the lower edge — object is cut off by the image border and appears photographed at close range (~0.8 m).

Partial close-up of a dark glossy leather padded chair back (approx. 0.5 m from camera) showing rounded top edge, pronounced vertical creases and seam lines, and a wrinkled, slightly reflective surface; only the upper back portion is visible and edge-cropped.

Frontal view of a stainless steel side-by-side double-door refrigerator with vertical dark handles and a reflective metallic finish that shows room reflections; small logo/badge on the upper-right door; lower front is partially occluded by a foreground object and slightly cropped at the bottom; estimated distance from camera ~1.5 m.

Rectangular cream/off-white runner rug with large orange and pink floral motifs and a narrow decorative border, printed low-pile textile lying on a hardwood floor and partially cut off at the right/top edge; faint script-like markings visible near the center; approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Front-facing black oven door with dark glass window and metal/stainless trim, top control panel visible and two light-colored towels draped over the handle with printed text; the appliance is partially cropped at the image edge and appears photographed from roughly 1.0 m away.

Round wall-mounted analog clock with a scalloped dark wooden frame, white face with black Roman numerals and black hands, glass-covered and slightly blurred; lower-right edge is slightly cropped — approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet with vertical recessed-panel doors and a matte finish; top and right sides are cut off in the crop (edge-cropped), lower front shows scuffs and wear—appears to be about 1.5 meters from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden chair with a glossy black leather seat cushion and ornate carved back; curved carved legs and stretcher bars are visible but partly cut off by the table and crop — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).

Front view of a stainless-steel over-range microwave with a large dark glass door showing glossy reflections and slight smudging; black control panel and keypad are visible at the right but the right edge of the unit is cut off by the crop, and the unit sits directly under a wood cabinet — approx. 0.7 m from camera.

Tall, wall-mounted dark stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and matte finish; the crop shows the left and top edges clearly while the right side is partially cut off, and the door appears roughly 0.8–1.0 m from the camera.

Close-up, nearly full-front view of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular center panel and vertical wood grain; finish is slightly glossy with subtle wear and a small round blemish near the upper center; photographed close (approx. 1.2 m from camera); right edge is slightly cropped by the image border and no hardware (knob/handle) is clearly visible.

Tall, narrow dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with two recessed rectangular panels and simple moulded edges, vertical grain and matte finish; crop shows the door nearly full-height with the left frame edge visible and no handle visible (approx. 0.8 m from camera).

Front-facing compact black plastic single-serve coffee maker with a circular top pod chamber, removable drip tray and a small chrome accent; glossy plastic surface, dim lighting, appliance is mostly visible and centered (not edge-cropped), estimated about 0.6 m from the camera.

Tall dark wooden single-panel cabinet door with a recessed border and a small rectangular handle near the top; surface has a matte finish with subtle scuffing and a lighter central reflection; mostly visible but slightly edge-cropped at the left and right, suggesting a built-in cupboard door roughly 2.0 meters from the camera.

Close-up of a dark mahogany-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and simple molded frame, glossy finish with slight surface wear; vertically oriented and slightly edge-cropped in the image, no hardware visible — estimated distance about 0.6 m from camera.

Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet door showing a recessed rectangular panel with thin molded inner trim; the crop shows the lower portion of the door, edge-cropped on the left, with visible wood grain, a matte finish and slight scuffing along the bottom edge — approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Dark stained wooden recessed-panel upper wall cabinet door, vertically oriented and wall-mounted with its left edge cropped by the image border; visible wood grain and slight surface wear, no handle visible, approximately 0.8 meters from the camera.

Dark brown stained wooden lower cabinet door with a recessed center panel and glossy finish, slight wear near the top edge; right side is edge-cropped in the image and the cabinet appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped view of the lower portion of a dark reddish-brown wooden cabinet with a glossy varnish, vertical paneled doors and rectangular metal handles visible; top and right side are cut off and wood grain and base molding are apparent — estimated distance ~1.2 m from camera.

Front portion of a rectangular island-style table: light tan patterned laminate or tiled top with a speckled rounded edge trim sitting on a dark brown wooden cabinet base with a vertical center seam and an electrical outlet on the right; red-green decorative object visible on top. The object is partially cropped at left and right edges and appears roughly 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial view of a dark-stained wooden display cabinet with several horizontal shelves and turned vertical spindles/balusters between shelves, holding assorted dishes, small figurines and decorative objects; the cabinet is seen through a white door/frame and is cropped at the image edge, approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.

Partial dark brown wooden cabinet front with a glossy finish and faint wood grain, showing a horizontal drawer seam beneath a light speckled granite countertop overhang; edge-cropped and close to the camera (approx. 0.7 m).

Tall, narrow dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and simple framed molding; vertical wood grain and slightly worn finish with a lighter glossy patch near the lower center — photographed at approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial edge crop showing a burgundy and cream floral-patterned upholstered chair (arm and seat cushion visible); fabric appears textured and slightly worn — photographed close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

Dark brown stained wooden base cabinet with two recessed-panel doors and a light countertop overhang visible at the top; lower edge shows slight wear and scuffing, vertically oriented and cut off at the right side (partial/edge-cropped). Approximate distance from camera ~0.8 m.

Partial white ceramic sink basin with visible rim and interior set into a beige/tan countertop; a small portion of metallic faucet hardware is visible at the rear and the right side of the sink is cut off by the crop; approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.

Partial, close-up view of a dark leather three-seat couch with tall padded, vertically stitched back cushions and segmented seat panels, visible creasing and a slightly shiny finish; the right armrest shows a built-in control/cupholder area and the object is edge-cropped in frame, approximately 1.2 meters from the camera.

Dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top and lower shelf holding a wicker basket, topped with small decorative items (plant leaves, white saucer, remote); glossy wood finish with minor wear, partially edge-cropped in the image and appearing about 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown leather-upholstered side table with a glossy, slightly scuffed curved top and visible stitched seams; a shallow recessed tray on the top contains a few small metallic objects (coins/buttons); appears worn/faux-leather and photographed at approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Small white fabric table lamp with a scalloped, slightly pleated shade and decorative trim; ceramic/painted white ornamental base is partially visible and cut off at the bottom, with faux-greenery wrapped around the stem. The lamp is turned on, casting a warm glow; appears to be approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

Dark brown/black leather three-seat reclining-style couch with high segmented padded backrests, stitched vertical seams and quilted seat panels; padded armrests with a visible right-side arm panel (possible cupholder), slight glossy leather sheen and minor creasing; left side of the couch is partially edge-cropped in the image; approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.

Dark stained wooden side table with a rounded front corner and curved apron, visible lower shelf and turned leg detail; glossy finish with minor surface wear and top partially visible with blurred small items, right edge of the table is cropped by the image — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial crop of a dark brown/black leather couch armrest and adjacent cushion in the foreground; glossy, slightly worn leather with visible seam and creasing, edge-cropped and partially occluded by a wooden tray and basket — approximately 0.6 meters from the camera.

Close-up partial view of a dark brown/black leather couch arm and adjacent tufted seat corner, showing glossy worn leather, visible stitching and padded square quilting; crop is edge-cut and the object is approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark-painted carved fireplace surround with stepped molding and a visible vertical wavy decorative groove; the inner firebox is a black void at the crop edge and the surround is partially cut off on the right — appears to be photographed close-up (~0.8 m from camera).

Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark brown leather couch showing a rounded padded armrest and adjacent seat cushion with visible seam piping and glossy, slightly worn surface; the couch appears close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m away).

Partial, edge-cropped dark glass window pane showing strong interior reflections — a bright lamp glare and vertical blind-like stripe reflections are visible on a glossy, slightly blurred surface, with a dark frame along the right edge; appears to be about 1.5 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark brown/black leather couch back cushion with glossy, wrinkled upholstery, visible seam lines and surface wear; the view is edge-cropped and partial, approximately 0.7 meters from the camera.

Partial dark gray mantel and surround with layered horizontal molding at the top-left, a black rectangular firebox opening and textured stone hearth visible; the fireplace is edge-cropped in the image and appears close to the camera (approx. 1.2 m).

Full-front stainless steel side-by-side double-door refrigerator with vertical black recessed handles and a reflective, slightly smudged surface showing room reflections; modern, intact appearance and roughly 1.5 meters from the camera.

Partial, slightly blurred round wall clock with a dark scalloped wood or wood-like frame, white face printed with black Roman numerals and minute ticks, thin black hour and minute hands plus a thinner central second hand; lower-right edge of the clock is cut off in the crop, estimated ~1.5 m from the camera.

Rectangular narrow cream/ivory runner rug with orange-pink floral motifs at the ends, a thin darker border and faint decorative script along the center; flat-woven, low-pile appearance and partially cropped at the image edges, estimated about 0.8–1.2 meters from the camera.

Close-up of the oven front: stainless-steel fascia with a black glass oven window and chrome horizontal handle, two white printed kitchen towels draped over the handle; object is edge-cropped/partial in the image and appears photographed at close range (~0.8 m from camera).

Front-facing stainless steel over-the-range microwave with a reflective glass door and visible right-side digital control panel; unit is mounted under a wooden cabinet and the right edge is cropped in the image, surfaces show smudges; estimated distance from camera ~0.5 m.

Partial close-up of a dark mahogany wooden dining chair with a glossy lacquer finish, carved decorative legs and a black upholstered seat cushion; the chair is edge-cropped in the image and appears about 0.6 m from the camera.

Tall dark brown wooden cabinet with vertical recessed door panels and matte finish occupying the left two-thirds of the crop; top and right edges are partially cropped and an adjacent blue-gray wall is visible at the right; appears close to camera (approximately 1.5 m away).

Dark black/charcoal single-serve coffee maker with a rounded top and a silver circular accent; the frontal opening and drip tray are visible and the unit appears close to the camera and partially cropped at the edges (approx. 0.6 m away).

Partial tall, dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed raised panel and visible wood grain; matte finish shows slight surface wear and the right edge is cropped by the image — estimated distance ~0.8 m from the camera.

Partial view of a dark-stained wood island-style table with a light beige, patterned granite or stone countertop; the rectangular tabletop and front two-panel wooden base are visible while the right side is cropped by the image edge. A small decorative centerpiece sits on the top and there are minor scuffs along the base; an electrical outlet/sticker is visible on the right side. Approximate distance from camera ~1.2 meters.

Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and simple top trim; surface shows lighter central discoloration and minor scuffs, matte finish; left side is slightly edge-cropped in the image — approximate distance ~1.5 m from camera.

Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and narrow outer frame, vertical wood grain and a glossy finish producing a bright glare near the upper center; door is mostly centered and fully visible in the crop, estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.

Tall dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a raised central panel and rectangular framed trim, smooth slightly glossy surface and visible wood grain; mostly visible in crop but top and bottom are slightly edge-cropped — estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.

Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel, glossy varnished finish and visible wood grain; no handle visible and the crop is slightly edge‑cropped at the sides — appears within about 0.8 m of the camera.

Partial lower section of a dark reddish-brown polished wooden cabinet with recessed paneled doors and small metal knobs, edge-cropped on the left and sitting at floor level; appears close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m away).

White plastic rectangular wall outlet faceplate with two vertically aligned round socket openings; the crop is blurred/soft-focus and the plate is partially cut off at the image edge, appearing close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m).

Lower section of a brown stained wooden cabinet door showing a recessed rectangular panel and a vertical seam; matte finish with light scuffs and wear. The image is edge-cropped at the bottom so the cabinet is partial in the frame and the very bottom/floor is visible, suggesting the cabinet is close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away). No knob or hardware is visible in this crop.

Narrow, partial view of a white-painted cabinet door frame and jamb with interior wooden shelves visible through the opening holding stacked round decorative items (plates or vases); the object is edge-cropped and appears close to the camera, approximately 1.0 m away.

Partial edge-cropped upper wall cabinet door in dark reddish-brown stained wood with a recessed raised-panel rectangular center and visible wood grain, matte finish and no hardware visible; appears to be about 1.2 meters from the camera.

Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet/closet door with a recessed central panel and narrow surrounding frame, wood-veneer grain visible, slightly worn finish with a lighter glossy reflection near the lower center; occupies most of the vertical crop and appears photographed from about 1.0 m away (tight crop).
Partial close-up of a black enameled gas stovetop showing cast-iron burner grates and front control knobs; the crop is edge-cut and photographed from roughly 0.5 m away.

Upper wall-mounted dark brown wooden cabinet with two recessed-panel doors and a central vertical seam; matte stained finish shows subtle wood grain and minor scuffs, bottom edge of the cabinet is cut off by the crop and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

Partial close-up of a glossy white ceramic sink basin inset into a wood-tone countertop, showing the visible rim and rounded-rectangular basin shape with the crop cutting off the edges; approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and a matching drawer front above, glossy finish with light scuffs, right side cropped by the image edge and a light countertop edge visible at top; approximately 0.7 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Close-up of a dark mahogany-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and simple molded frame, glossy finish with slight surface wear; vertically oriented and slightly edge-cropped in the image, no hardware visible — estimated distance about 0.6 m from camera.
